name: Crypto Market META MCP
description: Pay-per-call x402 META-aggregator: composes 5 already-shipped MT services (coinpaprika + coincap + coinlore + cryptocompare + kraken) in parallel into a single cross-feed consensus price (median + mean + spread) per symbol. Single billable hit per price-discovery query instead of N. Pay USDC on Base — no signup, no API key.

authentication.credentials: Pay-per-call via x402 USDC on Base — no signup, no API key. Each call returns 402; settle X-PAYMENT to 0x1664530DC2A1CA350B1dbaD1Fc1F1a70c90fe4de in Base USDC.

skills.name: Cross-feed crypto consensus price (5-feed fan-out)
skills.description: Fan-out to 5 feeds (coinpaprika, coincap, coinlore, cryptocompare, kraken) and return median/mean/spread + per-feed price_usd. Fail-soft per feed. $0.10/call.

skills.name: Crypto consensus plain-English summary
skills.description: Plain-English summary of the 5-feed consensus price. $0.05/call.

endpoints.description: Cross-feed crypto consensus price across 5 feeds.
